monitor.notes: Screen brightness now actually dims the gauge (the slider + auto-dim were previously dead — this AMOLED ignores the hardware brightness command, so dimming is now done in software). Under the hood: safer wireless sensor updates (over-size chunks are rejected instead of silently corrupting the image) and a small update-acknowledgement race hardened. Includes the v0.2 release: SN-AXIS-style over-the-air updates, BLE discoverability fix, per-page arc colour + settable redline, all OBD channels, calculated gear.

node.notes: Instant reconnect after starting the car — no waiting, no pressing the sensor's button. The sensor wakes the moment the car's data bus comes alive (CAN-activity wake) instead of only on a 30-second timer. This build also stops a parked car's background bus chatter from keeping the sensor awake and draining the battery (a false wake now re-sleeps in ~5s instead of 90s). Includes the v0.2 channel + calculated-gear set and wireless (OTA) updates relayed through the gauge.
